chapter_title.en: The Description of the Ablution of the Messenger of Allah {saws}

text: 78 - وَ قَدْ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ اَلْوُضُوءَ حَدٌّ مِنْ حُدُودِ اَللَّهِ لِيَعْلَمَ اَللَّهُ مَنْ يُطِيعُهُ وَ مَنْ يَعْصِيهِ وَ أَنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ لاَ يُنَجِّسُهُ شَيْءٌ وَ إِنَّمَا يَكْفِيهِ مِثْلُ اَلدَّهْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.78 - It has been narrated (by Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) ) that:
"Ablution is a limit set by Allah (swt) so that He may know who obeys Him and who disobeys Him. And a believer is not made impure by anything ; rather, something like oil is sufficient for him”.
